$comment: Master move database for VPG Engine. Each move lists all eligible slot categories explicitly. For slot category definitions and cascade rules see data/moves/move-slots.md. For power tier scale, feature values, and boolean flag definitions see data/README.md.
$status: In progress — front grapple categories complete. Back grapple, ground, turnbuckle, ringside, apron, Irish whip, taunt, and double-team categories to be added.
